Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (4.3) and vocational skills for employment (4.4) in digital marketing. It also explicitly includes 'sustainability issues' as a core competence (4.7).
evidence: digital marketing concepts are knowledge that modern students must possess for job hunting
